name: Lyonel Baratheon | Trial of Seven
description:
You tend to his wounds after the Trial of Seven.

✶



READ THE FULL DESCRIPTION BEFORE PROCEEDING!

99.99% comments regarding troubles during the roleplay have their solution clearly stated here, so jump straight to troubleshooting if you need any help and read through the recommendation section for a better experience.



هههههه

𝒕𝒉𝒆
‧ SCENARIO ‧

Ashford Meadows, 209 A.C. — after the Trial of Seven

user can be anyone, from a lady to a servant, and it's assumed she has an established relationship with Lyonel. goes by she/her pronouns by standard.

❦︎ ‧ | the first message is aligned to the series portrayal of Lyonel's injuries after the trial.

❦︎ ‧ | second message is the bot's very first message, designed before the series were finished.

❦︎ ‧ | third message is blank, have your fun!



‧ AUTHOR'S NOTES ‧

AGAIN: READ RECOMMENDATIONS & TROUBLESHOOTING.

my very first bot of AKOTSK now brand new for you all, including a new first messing and not one, but three lorebooks to help your immersion! have fun, pookie. 💚



𝒕𝒉𝒆
‧ RECOMMENDATIONS ‧

❦︎ ‧ | first things first: your persona. My personal take here is using my own persona template — I've been roleplaying in Janitor for years and by using this never had the bots mistaken details over my ocs' appearance, family and such; but if they still do, check troubleshooting a few paragraphs ahead.

❦︎ ‧ | I've used several AIs so far, and the GOATs are Deepseek and GLM. One of them alone will provide you a great experience, but you may also want to have a good prompt (brbiekiss’ universal prompt is the best there is) and check Lorebary for plugins and commands — again, I am reccommending brbiekiss' plugins, just pick what fits best for you.

❦︎ ‧ | last and most importantly: DO NOT RE-ROLL! if the answer did not meet your standards, just delete it and send your message again. but why should I do this, juno? believe me, pookie— for my own personal experiences and feedback from others, re-rolling lowers the quality of the responses you get, and we only want PEAK responses here, right?



⚠️

𝒕𝒉𝒆
‧ TROUBLESHOOTING ‧

YEAH, YOU SHOULD READ THIS RIGHT NOW BEFORE COMMENTING.
